sections.label: TOOL CALL: python
sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# Check what changed between previous and current frame
if previous_frame:
    prev_seg = previous_frame.segmentation
    curr_seg = current_frame.segmentation
    
    # Compare node lists
    prev_nodes = {n['id']: n for n in prev_seg['nodes']}
    curr_nodes = {n['id']: n for n in curr_seg['nodes']}
    
    # Find differences
    for nid in curr_nodes:
        if nid in prev_nodes:
            prev_n = prev_nodes[nid]
            curr_n = curr_nodes[nid]
            if prev_n['color'] != curr_n['color'] or prev_n['pixels'] != curr_n['pixels']:
                print(f"Node {nid} changed: color {prev_n['color']}->{curr_n['color']}, pixels {prev_n['pixels']}->{curr_n['pixels']}")
        else:
            print(f"New node {nid}: color={curr_nodes[nid]['color']}, pixels={curr_nodes[nid]['pixels']}")
    
    for nid in prev_nodes:
        if nid not in curr_nodes:
            print(f"Removed node {nid}: color={prev_nodes[nid]['color']}, pixels={prev_nodes[nid]['pixels']}")
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
